page_metadata.biotools__summary: Contains software for secondary structure prediction of one, two, or many interacting RNA or DNA molecules. It is composed of three pieces of software: SimFold, PairFold and MultiFold.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Contains software for secondary structure prediction of one, two, or many interacting RNA or DNA molecules. It is composed of three pieces of software: SimFold, PairFold and MultiFold.
